jobs.title: Sound Designer, 3097-1
jobs.description:
Role

Design and deliver audio assets for on-air graphics packages — including opens, transitions, and lower thirds — for live sports broadcasts. Support internal Staff Audio Designers within the Product organization. Establish and maintain a distinct sonic identity for each sporting event property. Build and curate a sound effects library for the On-Air Product live sports team.

Must be available to support live broadcast schedules, including evenings and weekends as needed.

On-Air | Remote | Part-time

Requirements

5+ years of experience designing audio for TV, film, games, commercials, or broadcast
Experience shipping a high-profile project in one of the above mediums
Deep understanding of sonic branding principles and how audio supports visual identity and viewer experience
Strong collaborative and communication skills
Ability to work autonomously and make confident creative decisions with minimal direction
Ability to manage a high volume of deliverables under tight turnaround times
Flexibility to adapt to changing scope and specifications
Proficiency in Pro Tools for session handoff and delivery

Preferred

Experience in live sports broadcast or live event production

To Apply

A portfolio or reel demonstrating relevant audio design work is required for consideration

Pay Rate Range

$80–90/hr.

Show more

Show less

Seniority level

Not Applicable

Employment type

Contract

Job function

Business Development

Industries

Staffing and Recruiting
